title: Juara 1 Olimpiade Sains Nasional
description: Tim siswa EduSchool meraih medali emas dalam Olimpiade Sains Nasional bidang Fisika.
descriptionEn: EduSchool student team won gold medal in the National Science Olympiad in Physics.

title: Sekolah Adiwiyata Tingkat Provinsi
description: Penghargaan sekolah peduli lingkungan dari Pemerintah Provinsi Bali.
descriptionEn: Environmental awareness school award from the Bali Provincial Government.

title: Juara 1 Lomba Tari Tradisional Bali
description: Siswa EduSchool meraih juara pertama dalam festival tari tradisional tingkat provinsi.
descriptionEn: EduSchool students won first place in the provincial traditional dance festival.

title: Akreditasi A - Unggul
description: Semua program pendidikan EduSchool meraih akreditasi A (Unggul) dari BAN-SM.
descriptionEn: All EduSchool education programs achieved A (Excellent) accreditation from BAN-SM.

title: Robotics Competition International
description: Tim robotik EduSchool meraih posisi 3 besar dalam kompetisi robotik internasional di Singapura.
descriptionEn: EduSchool robotics team achieved top 3 in the international robotics competition in Singapore.

title: Sekolah Sehat Nasional
description: Penghargaan sebagai sekolah sehat dari Kementerian Kesehatan RI.
descriptionEn: Award as a healthy school from the Indonesian Ministry of Health.
